name: Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Colored Rotini pasta (cook, drain, and cool)
1/4 cup fresh basil (chopped) -or- 2 1/2 teaspoons dried basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta according to package instructions, then drain and let cool.
2. In a large bowl, combine the cooled pasta, feta cheese, tomato pieces, green pepper pieces, red pepper pieces, and chopped green onion.
3. In a separate small bowl, whisk together olive oil, red wine vinegar, basil (fresh or dried), oregano, salt, and pepper to create the dressing.
4. Pour the dressing over the pasta mixture and gently toss until well combined.
5. Enjoy!
